title: Gemini Nano Banana Watermark Remover
subtitle: Remove Gemini Nano Banana & Gemini Omni video/image watermarks losslessly using Reverse Alpha Blending · 100% Local
metaDescription: A client-side tool for losslessly removing Gemini Nano Banana and Gemini Omni video & image watermarks using Reverse Alpha Blending. 100% local and private.
dropText: Drag & drop images here, or click to select files
dropHint: Supports PNG, JPG, MP4, WebM formats. Batch upload available
step1Desc: Drag & drop or click to select watermarked images or videos
step2Desc: System automatically detects and removes watermarks
step3Desc: Preview and download processed images or videos
privacyNote: All processing is done locally in your browser. Images are never uploaded
madeBy: Made by The walking fish 步行魚
lightboxHint: Click image to toggle Original / Processed
forceRemoveDesc: Force watermark removal even if not detected (useful for detection failures)
watermarkOpacityDesc: Adjust alpha blending intensity (0 for auto)
customSettingsDesc: Manually adjust advanced settings like margin and intensity
videoPreviewDesc: Show preview window to adjust margin and intensity upon video upload
